nasb.text: The anger of the Lord will not turn back Until He has performed and carried out the purposes of His heart; In the last days you will clearly understand it.

esv.text: The anger of the Lord will not turn back until he has executed and accomplished the intents of his heart. In the latter days you will understand it clearly.

cnv.text: 耶和華的怒氣必不轉消， 直到他作成和實現他心中的計劃。 在末後的日子， 你們就會完全明白這事。

ccb.text: 耶和华不完成祂心中的计划决不息怒。 将来你们会清楚地明白这一切。
